title: Better Pressure Plates
description: Resourcepack that makes all pressure plates have a unique texture, instead of copying their material! Works for any version over 1.8.9
body:
# Refreshed pressure plates
- This resourcepack gives every pressure plate a unique texture, instead of using the same as the block they are made of, while keeping the vanilla style. This includes every type of pressure plate, including the new pale oak one.
## Works on most versions
- The pack works on all versions from 1.8.9 to the most recent. The one download provided should work on every version. The game may say that the pack is for older/newer versions, but you can just ignore that.
  
![A picture of 16 different pressure plates in front of their respective blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/782fd8ab8e05e4a4e39247dfb4a6bbee73936ac8.png)

I publish all of my resourcepacks for **free**, and ad revenue is usually around 3$ per month from all of them combined, so any donations are very appreciated.

[![A pixelart of the word "donate"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/92ff631c976bd58fbb443ae89158499badb2a6b7.png)](https://www.paypal.com/donate/?hosted_button_id=B75MGYUT2UCDC)

### If you want to report a bug or have a suggestion, you can message me on discord @aspoleczne
